titleStmt.title: SII 26.485: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 485. (A.R. No. 461A of 1909.) ŚUTTAMALLI, TIRUNELVELI TALUK, TIRUNELVELI DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged at the beginning.

It is another copy of No. 484 above. But here, however, the signatories were Indirasamāṉappallavaraiyaṉ the puravari tiṇaikkaḷa-nāyakam, a certain person (name lost) stated to be Viḷattūruḍaiyāṉ of Viḷattūr alias Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻanallūr in Kaḷakkūṟṟu in Miḻalaik-kūṟṟam, a certain Nuḷambādarāyaṉ and a certain Mīṉavaṉ Viḻupparaiyaṉ, a puravari tiṇaikkaḷa-nāyakam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṭu 7 ḷ Antarāya
m Uṭpaṭat tevatā
ṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭapaṭikku
Uḷvaṟi melvempanāṭṭu
c cuttamali
yāṉa viraviṉota
ccaturvvetimaṅkala
ttu pakavatiśvaramuṭaiyā
rkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭ
ṭu veṇṭum nivantaṅka
ḷukku Antarāya muṭpaṭat te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāy Iṟup
patāka muḷḷināṭṭu rājarā
jaccaturvvetimaṅkalattuk kā
r pacāṉam viḷaiyu nilattu Aṅ
kavayijyaril śrīvallava sava
ṉā tarāyar jivitamāṉa nilattil
tavirttu Ivvūril kaṭamai I
ṟukkum kolāl Iṭṭa nilam (1/2)
nilam Araiyum Eḻāvatu pacāṉa
mutal Antarāyam Uṭpaṭat te
vatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭa
maikku Ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷa
nāyakam Intirasamāṉappalla
varaiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai puravariti
ṇaikkaḷam kaṇakkeḻutivikka kū
ṟṟukku kūṟu miḻalaik kūṟṟattuk ka
ḷakkūṟṟu viḷattūrāṉa jayaṅko
ṇṭacoḻanallūr viḷattūru
ṭaiyāṉ nā
nuḷampātarāyaṉ pura
varitiṇaikkaḷanāya yarāṉe
muttu Ivai puravaritiṇaikkaḷanāyakam
miṉavaṉ viḻupparaiyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 26.485 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
